mapper.insert: INSERT INTO haosen_project..md_fuzzy_match_batch ( batch_id, status, data_type, original_filename, message, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{batchId}, #{status}, #{dataType}, #{originalFilename}, #{message}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE haosen_project..md_fuzzy_match_batch SET status = #{status}, message = #{message}, update_time = GETDATE() WHERE batch_id = #{batchId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO haosen_project..md_fuzzy_match_summary ( batch_id, data_type, id, original_province, original_name, original_address, keyid, name, remark, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{batchId}, #{dataType}, #{originalId}, #{originalProvince}, #{originalName}, #{originalAddress}, #{keyid}, #{name}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
